PROP-baseauction-inv-069.text: When both price sources are stale, the most recent timestamp wins in getAssetPrice.
PROP-baseauction-inv-069.assertion: if both stale: updatedAt(streams) >= updatedAt(dataFeed) => use streams, else use dataFeed

locations.note: lines 390-401: dataFeed price replaces streams only when dataFeedUpdatedAt > updatedAt (streams); both stale case uses most recent
